data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the race condition handling requirement, specifically the 'first tap wins' scenario. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented or functioning as expected. The linked use case describes the scenario but lacks concrete evidence of the race condition handling mechanism, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of race condition handling (first tap wins) implementation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the race condition handling requirement.
